```text
    37→import { commentStoragePrefix } from '../comment/CommentBox/providers'
    38→import { useRoomContext } from './Room'
    39→
    40→export const Presence = () => {
    41→  const isClient = useIsClient()
    42→
    43→  return isClient ? <PresenceImpl /> : null
    44→}
    45→
    46→const presenceStoredNameAtom = atomWithStorage(buildNSKey('presence-name'), '')
    47→
    48→const PresenceImpl = () => {
    49→  const { roomName } = useRoomContext()
    50→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    51→  const { refetch } = useQuery({
    52→    ...queries.activity.presence(roomName),
    53→
    54→    refetchOnMount: true,
    55→    refetchInterval: 30_000,
    56→  })
    57→
    58→  const identity = useSocketSessionId()
    59→
    60→  const reader = useSessionReader()
    61→  const owner = useOwner()
    62→
    63→  const isOwnerLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    64→  const commentStoredName = (() => {
    65→    const value = globalThis?.localStorage.getItem(
    66→      `${commentStoragePrefix}author`,
    67→    )
    68→    if (value) {
    69→      return safeJsonParse(value) || value
    70→    }
    71→    return ''
    72→  })()
    73→
    74→  const presenceStoredName = useAtomValue(presenceStoredNameAtom)
    75→  const displayName = useMemo(
    76→    () =>
    77→      isOwnerLogged
    78→        ? owner?.name
    79→        : reader?.name || presenceStoredName || commentStoredName || '',
    80→    [
    81→      commentStoredName,
    82→      isOwnerLogged,
    83→      owner?.name,
    84→      presenceStoredName,
    85→      reader?.name,
    86→    ],
    87→  )
    88→
    89→  const update = useDebouncedCallback(async (position: number) => {
    90→    const sid = await socketWorker.getSid()
    91→    if (!sid) return
    92→    return apiClient.activity.updatePresence({
    93→      identity,
    94→      position,
    95→      sid,
    96→      roomName,
    97→      displayName: displayName || void 0,
    98→      readerId: reader?.id,
    99→      ts: getServerTime().getTime() || Date.now(),
   100→    })
   101→  }, 1000)
   102→
   103→  const percent = useReadPercent()
   104→
   105→  const updateWithPercent = useEventCallback(() => update(percent))
   106→
   107→  useEffect(() => {
   108→    const handler = () => {
   109→      refetch()
   110→      updateWithPercent()
   111→    }
   112→    globalThis.addEventListener(EmitKeyMap.SocketConnected, handler)
   113→
   114→    return () => {
   115→      globalThis.removeEventListener(EmitKeyMap.SocketConnected, handler)
   116→    }
   117→  }, [refetch, updateWithPercent])
   118→
   119→  useEffect(() => {
   120→    update(percent)
   121→  }, [percent, update])
   122→
   123→  if (isMobile) return null
   124→
   125→  return <ReadPresenceTimeline />
   126→}
   127→
   128→const TRACK_TOP = 64
   129→const TRACK_BOTTOM = 64
   130→
   131→const ReadPresenceTimeline = () => {
   132→  const sessionId = useSocketSessionId()
   133→  const isImmersive = useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled()
   134→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false)
   135→
   136→  const { roomName } = useRoomContext()
   137→  const activityPresenceIdsCurrentRoom = useActivityPresenceByRoomName(roomName)
   138→
   139→  const uniqueActivityPresenceIdsCurrentRoom = uniq(
   140→    activityPresenceIdsCurrentRoom,
   141→  )
   142→
   143→  return (
   144→    <RootPortal>
   145→      <m.div
   146→        className="fixed left-0 top-0 z-[3] h-screen w-8"
   147→        data-hide-print
   148→        animate={{
   149→          opacity: isImmersive ? 0 : 1,
   150→        }}
   151→        transition={Spring.presets.smooth}
   152→        style={{
   153→          pointerEvents: isImmersive ? 'none' : 'auto',
   154→        }}
   155→        onMouseEnter={() => setIsHovered(true)}
   156→        onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)}
   157→      >
   158→        <m.div
   159→          className="relative h-full"
   160→          animate={{ width: isHovered ? 200 : 24 }}
   161→          transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 35 }}
   162→        >
   163→          {/* Expanded backdrop panel */}
   164→          <AnimatePresence>
   165→            {isHovered && (
   166→              <m.div
   167→                className="absolute inset-0 border-r border-border bg-base-100/95 backdrop-blur-sm"
   168→                initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   169→                animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   170→                exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   171→                transition={{ duration: 0.18 }}
   172→              />
   173→            )}
   174→          </AnimatePresence>
   175→
   176→          {/* Track region */}
   177→          <div
   178→            className="absolute left-0 right-0"
   179→            style={{ top: TRACK_TOP, bottom: TRACK_BOTTOM }}
   180→          >
   181→            {uniqueActivityPresenceIdsCurrentRoom.map((identity) => (
   182→              <TimelineItem
   183→                key={identity}
   184→                identity={identity}
   185→                type={identity === sessionId ? 'current' : 'other'}
   186→                isExpanded={isHovered}
   187→              />
   188→            ))}
   189→          </div>
   190→
   191→          {/* Bottom: current user progress */}
   192→          <div
   193→            className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-start"
   194→            style={{ height: TRACK_BOTTOM }}
   195→          >
   196→            {isHovered && sessionId && (
   197→              <m.span
   198→                className="ml-3 mt-2 text-[10px] text-base-content/25"
   199→                initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   200→                animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   201→                exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   202→                transition={{ duration: 0.12 }}
   203→              >
   204→                <CurrentUserProgress sessionId={sessionId} />
   205→              </m.span>
   206→            )}
   207→          </div>
   208→        </m.div>
   209→      </m.div>
   210→    </RootPortal>
   211→  )
   212→}
   213→
   214→interface TimelineItemProps {
   215→  identity: string
   216→  type: 'current' | 'other'
   217→  isExpanded: boolean
   218→}
   219→const TimelineItem: FC<TimelineItemProps> = memo(
   220→  ({ type, identity, isExpanded }) => {
   221→    const presence = useActivityPresenceBySessionId(identity)
   222→    const reader = useAuthReader(presence?.readerId || '')
   223→
   224→    const readPercent = useReadPercent()
   225→    const isCurrent = type === 'current'
   226→
   227→    const position = useDeferredValue(
   228→      isCurrent ? readPercent : presence?.position,
   229→    )
   230→    const isDark = useIsDark()
   231→    const bgColor = useMemo(() => {
   232→      if (!presence) return ''
   233→      return getColorScheme(stringToHue(presence.identity))[
   234→        isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'
   235→      ].accent
   236→    }, [isDark, presence])
   237→
   238→    if (!presence) return null
   239→    if (typeof position !== 'number') return null
   240→
   241→    const displayName =
   242→      reader?.name || presence?.displayName || (isCurrent ? '你' : '读者')
   243→
   244→    const isAnonymous = !reader?.name && !presence?.displayName
   245→
   246→    return (
   247→      <m.div
   248→        className="absolute left-0 right-0"
   249→        animate={{ top: `${position}%` }}
   250→        transition={{
   251→          type: 'spring',
   252→          stiffness: 120,
   253→          damping: 20,
   254→          mass: 0.8,
   255→        }}
   256→        style={{ marginTop: -10 }}
   257→      >
   258→        <div className="flex items-center">
   259→          {/* The bar itself */}
   260→          <m.div
   261→            style={{ backgroundColor: bgColor }}
   262→            animate={{
   263→              width: isExpanded ? 4 : 3,
   264→              height: isExpanded ? 20 : 10,
   265→              borderRadius: isExpanded ? 4 : 0,
   266→              marginLeft: isExpanded ? 6 : 0,
   267→              opacity: isCurrent ? 1 : isExpanded ? 0.85 : 0.6,
   268→            }}
   269→            transition={{
   270→              type: 'spring',
   271→              stiffness: 380,
   272→              damping: 30,
   273→            }}
   274→          />
   275→
   276→          {/* Expanded: avatar + name + percentage */}
   277→          {isExpanded && (
   278→            <m.div
   279→              className="ml-2.5 flex items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden"
   280→              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -8 }}
   281→              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
   282→              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -8 }}
   283→              transition={{
   284→                type: 'spring',
   285→                stiffness: 350,
   286→                damping: 28,
   287→                delay: 0.04,
   288→              }}
   289→            >
   290→              {/* Avatar or colored dot */}
   291→              {!isAnonymous && reader?.image ? (
   292→                <Avatar.Root className="size-[18px] ring-1 rounded-full overflow-hidden ring-border/30">
   293→                  <Avatar.Image src={reader.image} alt={displayName} />
   294→                  <Avatar.Fallback
   295→                    className="text-[7px] font-semibold"
   296→                    style={{
   297→                      backgroundColor: bgColor,
   298→                      color: 'var(--fallback-b1)',
   299→                    }}
   300→                  >
   301→                    {displayName[0]}
   302→                  </Avatar.Fallback>
   303→                </Avatar.Root>
   304→              ) : (
   305→                <div
   306→                  className="flex size-[18px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full"
   307→                  style={{ backgroundColor: bgColor }}
   308→                >
   309→                  {isCurrent && (
   310→                    <span
   311→                      className="text-[7px] font-bold"
   312→                      style={{ color: 'var(--fallback-b1)' }}
   313→                    >
   314→                      我
   315→                    </span>
   316→                  )}
   317→                </div>
   318→              )}
   319→
   320→              {/* Name */}
   321→              <span
   322→                className={`whitespace-nowrap text-[11px] font-semibold leading-none ${
   323→                  isCurrent ? 'text-base-content' : 'text-base-content/80'
   324→                }`}
   325→              >
   326→                {displayName}
   327→              </span>
   328→
   329→              {/* Percentage */}
   330→              <span className="text-[10px] tabular-nums text-base-content/40">
   331→                {Math.round(position)}%
   332→              </span>
   333→            </m.div>
   334→          )}
   335→        </div>
   336→      </m.div>
   337→    )
   338→  },
   339→)
   340→
   341→TimelineItem.displayName = 'TimelineItem'
   342→
   343→const CurrentUserProgress: FC<{ sessionId: string }> = ({ sessionId }) => {
   344→  const presence = useActivityPresenceBySessionId(sessionId)
   345→  const readPercent = useReadPercent()
   346→  const position = presence ? readPercent : 0
   347→
   348→  return <>已读 {Math.round(position)}%</>
   349→}
   350→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-01 11:14:42Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The issue is clear. In `TimelineItem` (line 224), `useReadPercent()` is called for ALL items, but it's only needed when `type === 'current'`. For `type === 'other'`, the position comes from `presence?.position`. Since `useReadPercent()` likely listens to scroll events, it causes all `TimelineItem` components to re-render on every scroll.

The fix is to split this into two components: one for `current` type that uses `useReadPercent()`, and one for `other` type that doesn't. Or, we can conditionally use the hook by extracting the current user's item into a separate component.


Since React hooks can't be called conditionally, I need to split `TimelineItem` into separate components. The cleanest approach is to create a `CurrentTimelineItem` that uses `useReadPercent()` and an `OtherTimelineItem` without it, then choose which one to render at the call site in `ReadPresenceTimeline`.

Refactoring the component selection...

I'm realizing the core issue: I can't conditionally call hooks, so I need to split the component structure. The cleanest approach is to create separate components for the current user and other users, where only the current user component calls `useReadPercent()`. This way I avoid the conditional hook problem entirely while keeping the code DRY. I'm realizing the core issue is that `useReadPercent()` gets called even for other users' timeline items, causing unnecessary re-renders. The cleanest solution is to split this into two separate components—one for the current user that calls the hook, and one for others that uses the presence position directly, with both rendering the same shared UI underneath. I'm realizing this is getting messy with the conditional rendering and hook usage. The cleanest approach would be to extract the content rendering into a shared component that accepts `position` as a prop, then create two lightweight wrappers—one that calls `useReadPercent()` for the current item and another that passes the presence position directly for other items. I'm noticing there's a lot of duplication between the current and other position components—they share the same hooks and rendering logic, just with different position sources. The cleanest approach would be to extract the shared logic into a single component that accepts position as a prop, or use a dispatcher pattern where `TimelineItem` routes to the appropriate variant based on type.

The dispatcher approach would split this into `TimelineItemCurrentPosition` for the current user's timeline and a shared `TimelineItemImpl` for everything else, eliminating the duplication while keeping the position logic separate at the component boundary.

Still writing the component structure... I see the issue now—`positionOverride` being passed as a prop means `TimelineItemImpl` will still re-render when the read percent changes, but the key insight is that only the current item receives this prop while other items don't, so they won't be affected by scroll updates. I'm refactoring this to separate the current item into its own component that consumes `useReadPercent`, keeping the other timeline items isolated from those re-renders.

Writing component structure... Writing component logic...

问题明确。`TimelineItem` 中所有实例皆调用 `useReadPercent()`，然 `other` 类型仅需 `presence?.position`，致滚动时全部 item 重渲染。

拆分组件，令 `useReadPercent()` 仅于 `current` 项中消费。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-01 11:15:14Z)**_

诊断皆为 IDE 模块解析问题，非本次改动所致。`useReadPercent` import 仍需保留，因 `PresenceImpl` 与 `CurrentUserProgress` 亦用之。

改动要点：

- `TimelineItem` 拆为调度层，`current` 类型渲染 `CurrentTimelineItem`（消费 `useReadPercent`），`other` 类型直接渲染 `TimelineItemImpl`（仅用 `presence.position`）
- `other` 类型之 item 不再订阅滚动事件，滚动时唯 `current` 项重渲染
